themes.reasoning_notes: Activated ability sacrifices it to deal X damage to any target, functioning as flexible creature or player removal.
Its own activation requires sacrificing it, but it does not reward or broadly support sacrifice synergies.
Its activated ability scales X into damage to any target, making it chiefly a red direct-damage mana payoff that can finish players.
The same activation can pick off a creature or planeswalker-sized target, but the card is broader and less efficient than dedicated removal.
The X activation lets excess mana convert into damage, though only once because sacrificing it is part of the cost.
